details.test: Task 1: Find and apply to matching Dota 2 EUW team
Task 2: Create Valorant NA East team recruiting Controller & Initiator
Task 3: Register Night Owls for best free Valorant NA East Saturday tournament
Task 4: Shortlist three Fortnite EU PC players with KD >= 2 and mic
Task 5: Choose higher-rated CS2 solo tournament under $10 for next weekend and register solo
Task 6: Remove least active Night Owls member and change Flex to Controller
Task 7: Join first two matching Overwatch 2 NA evening scrims as team
Task 8: Update Rocket League profile preferences and LFT status
Task 9: Contact NA East Platinum–Diamond applicant and send tryout invite
